{{Infobox character
| name = Larian
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Forge white arrows, sharp perception}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Monarch of the Empire}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[The Eight-Man Empire|Eight-Man Empire]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|archer}}
| birthplace = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[The Eight-Man Empire|Eight-Man Empire]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Unsouled (novel)|Unsouled]]
}}

''See also: [[Larian Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Larian is a renowned archer representing the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]]. Raised in a noble household, she achieved the [[Gold]] rank at only six years old, and her combat prowess is such that a massive army of [[Gold]]-ranked [[sacred artists]] would be unable to penetrate her armor. She utilizes a bow that resembles twisted gray driftwood and is capable of utilizing advanced techniques like [[Long-Sight]]. In combat, she can draw power from her allies to reach the level of a [[Monarch]]. Larian is characterized by a blunt, informal, and often playful personality. She frequently uses humor or mock terror to interact with others, though she can adopt a serious manner appropriate for a [[Sage]] when necessary. Despite her lightheartedness, she is highly skilled and possesses sharp observational abilities, such as noting when a person's spirit and body are not yet balanced. She has expressed a desire to shake up the existing system controlled by [[Monarchs]] and has participated in significant conflicts, including fighting [[Dreadgods]]. She eventually intends to ascend to the heavens, taking her accumulated wealth with her.}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Larian]] is a member of the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]] who was raised in a noble household and reached [[Gold]] rank at six years old.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Larian]] is a renowned archer of the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Larian]] is of the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14">''Bloodline'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Larian]] is a blonde woman in golden armor from the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Larian]] is a projection of her consciousness.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Larian is a [[Monarch]] of the [[Empire]] who wields the [[Bow of the Silent King]], an instrument crafted from gray driftwood. Possessing sharp perception and the ability to forge white arrows, this figure arrived clad in bright golden armor. Following a crash into a mountain peak near [[Sacred Valley]], [[Larian's armor]] was left cracked and leaking spiritual [[essence]]. During a confrontation, [[Dross]] threatened to haunt Larian should [[Lindon]] surrender the [[Weeping Dragon]]'s [[binding]]. Despite these trials, Larian eventually appeared at [[Lindon]]'s shoulder with great speed.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">11</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Larian]] is a character who possesses the [[Bow of the Silent King]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Larian]] can draw power to become a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Larian]] is a [[Monarch]] of the [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17">''Waybound'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Larian]] can [[Forge]] white arrows.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Larian]] has sharp perception.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Larian]] crashed into a mountain peak near [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Larian]]'s golden armor was cracked and spewing spiritual [[essence]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] threatened to haunt [[Larian]] if [[Lindon]] gave the [[Weeping Dragon]]'s [[binding]] to her.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Larian]] is a character who arrived in bright gold armor.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Larian]] is a figure in golden armor who carries a bow of gray driftwood.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33">''Waybound'', chapter 33</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Larian]] is a character who appears at [[Lindon]]'s shoulder very quickly.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
